hero.title: Decades of experience. One single firm.
hero.subtitle: NRG was founded in 2025 as a company, but the people who form it have spent their entire professional careers intervening turbines around the world. That is the only track record that matters when a plant is down.

philosophy.title: Why the team matters more than the company's age
paragraphs: In turbine engineering, companies don't solve problems — the people who arrive on site with experience, judgment, and hands do. A firm with 30 years of history but constant staff turnover may have less useful expertise than a young company whose team are veterans who have seen hundreds of machines.
NRG is exactly that: a team whose collective experience far exceeds the age of the company that now brings them together.

members.title: Meet the team
members.subtitle: While we finalize the public presentation of the team, we share the professional profiles that make up NRG. Names and photographs will be added shortly.

items.shortBio: Solid mechanical engineering background with a focus on rotating systems and plant design. Responsible for technical coordination, project engineering, and proposal development.
Over 15 years intervening turbines at hydroelectric, thermoelectric, and gas plants across Latin America, Europe, and Africa.
Over 15 years of international experience in turbine and generator maintenance and intervention. Solid track record in large-scale plants.

credentials.title: What the team brings to the table
credentials.subtitle: Metrics that reflect accumulated track records, not corporate years.

items.label: across hydro, steam and gas plants

approach.title: The judgment that only field years provide

items.title: Diagnosis before intervention
items.description: Before proposing a service, we understand the plant. That avoids unnecessary costs and generic solutions.

items.title: The supervisor owns the project technically
items.description: The person leading the job is present from the proposal through to close-out. No internal handoffs that lose context.

items.title: Documentation at major-operator standards
items.description: Reports, protocols, and technical dossiers that any external audit can review.

items.title: International mobility without friction
items.description: We are accustomed to mobilizing. We speak the sector's technical languages and understand its local regulations.

cta.title: Want to know how this team can help your plant?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a no-obligation technical call. We will introduce the team and discuss your specific situation.
